insights: Facsimile/printed signatures account for 28.6% (4/14) of rejections—strongest blocklist signal.
Specialty/novelty cards (gold foil, premium materials, non-standard products) represent 35.7% (5/14) of rejections.
Confirmed snipes feature genuine on-card autos from modern products (Topps Tribute 2023, Authentic Images 2001) with 80%+ market discounts.
Reprint/custom, wrong_player, and wrong_parallel collectively explain 42.9% (6/14) of rejections.
Rejected listings frequently contain promotional language (RARE, INVESTMENT, MVP, SSP) absent from confirmations.
All confirmations are authentic autographs from established manufacturers; no gold editions, reprints, or novelty parallels present.
Wrong card number/set mismatches in title vs. specifics appear in 14.3% (2/14) rejections.
Market price misalignment accounts for 7.1% (1/14) rejections; confirmed snipes show 80%+ delta below market avg.
